How o9 Works The Network
The Network · Topic 6

Cleaning

Item C is cleaned at the Central Warehouse to produce Item D.

The Cleaning BOM process receives the transported Item C and removes debris and dust to produce Item D — cleaned seed. The Cleaner machine resource is consumed at 1 hour per 100 kg. This is the first processing step at the Central Warehouse after the seeds arrive from the Grower.
